goal: Implement to-do items with Composer 2, run until all non-GA to-do items are complete. Non-GA means every open item in docs/status/* except GA Blocker §1 (MutationProposal accept/undo). Work from committed handoffs; follow repo AGENTS.md when closing backlog lines.
summary: Draining non-GA polish via orchestrate: merge worker branches for compose Redis idempotency, Fly app naming, CI dispatch, FE agent-metadata + CopilotShell i18n.
acceptanceCriteria: Each worker branch merges cleanly; backlog docs reflect closed slices per AGENTS.md
FE workers pass eslint, tsc, CI=true jest, vite build
BE-affecting workers pass pytest + ruff in backend/

tasks.name: compose-idempotency-redis
tasks.scopedGoal: Add IDEMPOTENCY_BACKEND=redis to backend docker-compose server env alongside existing RATE_LIMIT_BACKEND and BUDGET_BACKEND so local docker matches multi-worker prelude per release-todo §16d; refresh header comment about Redis backends.
tasks.brief: Read `.orchestrate/non-ga-todos-2f52/bootstrap/BACKLOG_OPEN_NON_GA.md` and `PATHS_AND_VERIFICATION.md`. Touch only backend/docker-compose.yml for the env vars; optionally tighten docs/status/release-todo.md §16d wording if compose parity is achieved (strike docker-compose caveat if accurate). Branch `cursor/non-ga-todos-2f52` or worker branch merge target — do not regress GA §1 mutation work.
acceptance: `IDEMPOTENCY_BACKEND=redis` appears next to REDIS_URI in backend/docker-compose.yml
Compose comment mentions idempotency + rate-limit + budget on Redis where applicable
If release-todo changed, backlog note matches AGENTS.md truth

tasks.name: fly-app-placeholder
tasks.scopedGoal: Close release-todo polish §16e: replace misleading Fly app placeholder with a repo-owned default name and explicit operator-override comment, or document removal path per that section.
tasks.brief: See bootstrap BACKLOG_OPEN_NON_GA.md. Prefer `app = "pulse-backend"` (or similar) with header comment: operators must rename to their Fly app. If you delete fly.toml instead, update backend README or docs/operations/deployment.md fallback path so no silent wrong-app deploy. Update docs/status/release-todo.md §16e to resolved or narrowed per AGENTS.md.
acceptance: No literal jira-python-server remains as the implied production app name without operator warning

tasks.name: copilot-shell-i18n
tasks.scopedGoal: Internationalize CopilotShell per ui-todo §20f: replace hardcoded tab labels, title, placeholder bodies, and CTA strings with microcopy keys in en + zh-CN.
tasks.brief: Read bootstrap PATHS_AND_VERIFICATION.md for FE checks. Add keys under a sensible `microcopy.copilotShell.*` (or extend existing namespace) in English and Chinese locale files; wire `src/components/copilotShell/index.tsx`. Keep a11y (no raw English in user-visible nodes). Update ui-todo.md §20f if the i18n debt for this file is cleared.
acceptance: No user-visible English literals remain in copilotShell except brand name if product decision
zh-CN entries exist for every new key
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: fe-agent-metadata-surface
tasks.scopedGoal: Partially close release-todo §14: consume at least one backend AgentMetadata field (e.g. rate_limit or allowed_autonomy) in the FE and show it in an existing AI surface (header health area, chat drawer, or Copilot settings tab) with graceful loading/empty states.
tasks.brief: Use `getAgentMetadata` from `src/utils/ai/agentClient.ts` for a relevant agent (e.g. chat-agent). Minimize new network chatter (cache per session). Extend or add tests alongside existing aiAccessibility.strict or component tests. Update docs/status/release-todo.md §14 only if behaviour materially addresses the polish item (partial vs done). Follow AGENTS.md dual-mount/useAgent patterns if touching hooks consumers.
acceptance: At least one AgentMetadata-backed UI affordance ships with tests
Remote-mode-only code paths gated when aiUseLocalEngine / empty base URL
eslint + tsc + CI jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: backend-ci-dispatch
tasks.scopedGoal: Reduce release-todo §7 friction: add workflow_dispatch to .github/workflows/backend-ci.yml so maintainers can trigger test-full/test-slim on demand without a path-filter push.
tasks.brief: Preserve existing pull_request/push path filters; add concurrency-friendly workflow_dispatch defaults. Optionally add a one-line note in docs/status/release-todo.md §7 describing how to capture evidence via manual dispatch.
acceptance: YAML validates; workflow_dispatch is present with documented inputs or default branch
Existing triggers unchanged aside from additive dispatch
